name_en: 【Top Original】With Packaging 🔥Reflecting its origins, GG Marmont features black matelassé leather with a soft structure. The Gucci Love Parade collection celebrates archival codes and new designs. This accessory features monochrome hardware and a top handle, embodying this concept.
name_cn:
【Top Original】With Packaging 🔥Reflecting its origins, GG Marmont features black matelassé leather with a soft structure. The Gucci Love Parade collection celebrates archival codes and new designs. This accessory features monochrome hardware and a top handle, embodying this concept.
Model: 702563, Color: Black/Black Hardware, Dimensions: 21*15.5*8
